info.title: MICROSERVICE_DEV_Transaction Management API
info.description: The Transaction Processing API enables seamless management and execution of financial transactions within microservices. This API provides functionalities to initiate, validate, and record transactions, ensuring accurate and timely processing. Typical consumers include financial service applications, e-commerce platforms, and any system requiring secure transaction handling. This API facilitates efficient tracking and reconciliation of transactions to enhance operational workflows.

post.description: This endpoint allows users to create a new transaction in the system. Provide the necessary details in the request body to initiate a transaction.

requestBody.description: Request body for creating a new transaction. It requires a JSON object that adheres to the specified schema.

404.description: The requested resource could not be found.

500.description: An unexpected error occurred on the server.

MICROSERVICE_DEV_createTransaction-Creat.title: ErrorResponse

timestamp.description: The timestamp of when the error occurred.

status.description: Indicates whether the request was successful.

error.description: A brief description of the error.

message.description: A detailed message describing the error.
message.example: Source account details not found for transaction processing.

path.description: The path of the requested resource.

suggestion.description: A suggestion on how to rectify the error.
suggestion.example: Verify account details and retry the transaction.

MICROSERVICE_DEV_createTransaction-Creat.description: Represents the structure of an error response when a transaction operation fails.

example.message: Source account details not found for transaction processing.

details.message: No active account exists for the provided account number.

example.suggestion: Verify account details and retry the transaction.

MICROSERVICE_DEV_createTransaction-Error.title: ErrorDetails

service.description: The service that encountered the error.

errorCode.description: An identifier for the specific type of error.

message.description: A detailed message about the specific error.

gateway.description: The payment gateway involved in the transaction.

retryable.description: Indicates if the operation can be retried.

MICROSERVICE_DEV_createTransaction-Error.description: Detailed information about the error encountered during the transaction.

MICROSERVICE_DEV_createTransaction-Creat.title: ErrorResponse

timestamp.description: The timestamp when the error occurred.

status.description: Indicates whether the operation was successful or not.

error.description: A short description of the error.

message.example: Unable to process financial transaction due to internal service failure.

path.description: The request path that caused the error.

trace.description: A stack trace of the error for debugging purposes.

details.description: Object providing additional details about the error.

suggestion.description: Suggestions for resolving the error, if applicable.
suggestion.example: Please retry after some time or contact support if the issue persists.

MICROSERVICE_DEV_createTransaction-Creat.description: Schema representing the error response for the transactions operation.

example.message: Unable to process financial transaction due to internal service failure.

details.message: Payment gateway timeout while processing transaction request.

example.suggestion: Please retry after some time or contact support if the issue persists.

MICROSERVICE_DEV_createTransaction-Creat.title: Transaction Request Body

customerId.description: The unique identifier for the customer initiating the transaction.

accountNumber.description: The account number from which the transaction will be executed.

transactionType.description: The type of transaction being performed (e.g., debit, credit).

amount.description: The amount of money involved in the transaction.

currency.description: The currency in which the transaction amount is specified (e.g., USD, EUR).

beneficiaryAccount.description: The account number of the beneficiary (for transfers).

transactionDate.description: The date when the transaction is to take place, formatted as YYYY-MM-DD.

paymentMode.description: The mode of payment being used for the transaction (e.g., online, cash).

remarks.description: Additional remarks or notes related to the transaction.

MICROSERVICE_DEV_createTransaction-Creat.description: Schema representing the request body for a transaction operation.

MICROSERVICE_DEV_createTransaction-Creat.title: Transaction Response

transactionId.description: The unique identifier for the transaction.

customerId.description: The unique identifier for the customer associated with the transaction.

accountNumber.description: The account number from which the transaction is processed.

transactionType.description: The type of transaction (e.g., debit, credit).

amount.description: The amount of money involved in the transaction.

currency.description: The currency code (e.g., USD, EUR) associated with the transaction amount.

status.description: The current status of the transaction (e.g., completed, pending, failed).

processedAt.description: The timestamp indicating when the transaction was processed.

paymentMode.description: The mode of payment used for the transaction (e.g., credit card, bank transfer).

message.description: A message providing additional information about the transaction.

MICROSERVICE_DEV_createTransaction-Creat.description: This schema represents the response for a successful transaction operation.

environment.name: environment
environment.description: Environment used to select the workflow branch.

serviceCategory.name: serviceCategory
serviceCategory.description: Service category used to select the workflow branch.
